examples.title: Disabled action
examples.description: Keeps an unauthorized action visible with an accessible scope reason.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AccessGate } from '@lostgradient/cinder/access-gate';
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';

  const canCancelWorkflow = false;
</script>

<AccessGate granted={canCancelWorkflow} reason="Requires scope: workflows:cancel">
  <Button label="Cancel workflow" variant="danger" />
</AccessGate>

examples.title: Locked section
examples.description: Replaces a protected region with a scope-required placeholder.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { AccessGate } from '@lostgradient/cinder/access-gate';
</script>

<AccessGate
  granted={false}
  variant="section"
  reason="Requires scope: storage:admin"
  requirement="storage:admin"
/>
